overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a sunlit dirt path through rural countryside. The character passes wooden fences, sunflower fields, a farmstead, and overtakes a horse-drawn cart before entering a darker forested area with a path junction.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit rural path with sunflower fields and wooden fences

events.description: distant stone tower becomes visible on the horizon ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path with two swords strapped to his back, passing sunflowers and wooden fences

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence running parallel to the left side of the path
weathered wooden fence with tall sunflowers growing alongside on the right
cluster of tall blooming sunflowers behind the right fence
winding dirt trail with patches of mud and grass
tall stone tower visible on the horizon through the haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit rural dirt path bordered by wooden fences and sunflower fields. The character walks steadily forward as a distant stone tower becomes visible on the horizon, with warm golden hour lighting casting long shadows across the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmstead area with thatched roof building

events.description: farm building with thatched roof appears on the left side of the path
horse-drawn cart with two occupants comes into view ahead on the path
character moves to the left side of the path to overtake the slow-moving cart

agents.ego_description: walking past a rural farmstead and overtaking a horse-drawn cart on the left side

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn wooden cart moving slowly along the path carrying two passengers

entered.detail: rustic wooden structure with thatched roof and an attached cart on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character passes a wooden farmstead with a thatched roof on the left as the sunflowers and distant tower disappear from view. A horse-drawn cart with two occupants appears ahead on the path, and the character overtakes it by moving to the left side of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with wooden signpost and junction

events.description: wooden signpost appears on the left side at a path junction
lighting becomes noticeably darker as the path enters dense tree cover

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as it enters a darker forested section with denser vegetation

entered.detail: weathered wooden sign indicating directions at the trail junction
fork in the dirt trail offering multiple directions forward

segments.scene_description: After passing the cart, the trail enters a denser forested area where the lighting becomes noticeably darker. A wooden signpost appears at a path junction on the left, and the surrounding vegetation grows thicker with tall trees lining both sides of the winding dirt trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit rural path that gradually transitions into a shadowed forest. It begins on a dirt trail bordered by wooden fences and sunflower fields, moving forward as a distant stone tower emerges on the horizon under warm golden hour lighting. As the character advances, the sunflowers and tower fade from view, replaced by a thatched-roof farmstead and a horse-drawn cart that the camera overtakes by shifting to the left. The scene then shifts as the trail enters a denser forested area where the light dims and the vegetation grows thicker. Finally, the camera follows the winding path toward a wooden signpost at a junction, surrounded by tall trees that enclose the landscape.
